acts.name: Setup
beats: At least one suspect becomes visible

acts.name: Pressure
beats: A second suspect or complication emerges
Sabotage method or target becomes clearer

goal: Identify the conspirators, confirm the method of sabotage, and stop it before public disaster or humiliation strikes the fair.
name: The Sabotage of the White City
premise: The player must uncover and stop a conspiracy to sabotage the World's Columbian Exposition before opening day.
openingSituation: A discrepancy in shipping manifests and an unnerving conversation overheard near the Administration Building suggest that someone is tampering with critical fair infrastructure.
